# Feature: SQLite FTS Search Index

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Deterministic search backed by SQLite FTS5 index populated on scan, with ranked German text support and in-memory fallback when the index is missing.

## Preconditions
- Scan writes pages.json and flows.json to `.autoguide/`
- `@iamthamanic/autoguide-core` exposes `searchKnowledge` for in-memory search

## Happy Path
- [ ] FTS5 `search_fts` table populated on scan with page/flow title, description, route, and step text
- [ ] `SqliteIndex.searchFts` returns ranked `SearchHit[]` using BM25
- [ ] German queries (e.g. „Mitarbeiter“, „Übersicht“) match umlaut text
- [ ] `searchWithFallback` uses SQLite when index exists, else reads JSON and calls `searchKnowledge`
- [ ] Optional `autoguide search <query>` CLI command prints ranked results

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty query returns TOC-like recent pages/flows (first 5 each)
- [ ] Role filter respects empty roleIds = visible to all
- [ ] Secrets redacted before indexing (existing redactString)
- [ ] Missing index.sqlite falls back without error

## Regression
- [ ] Existing storage redaction tests pass
- [ ] Widget adapters unchanged (still use in-memory searchKnowledge via props)

## Assumptions
- FTS5 `unicode61` tokenizer handles German umlauts
- Widget loader hook for runtime SQLite access is deferred (future slice)

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/storage/src/sqlite-index.ts` — FTS5 `search_fts` table, `rebuildSearchFts`, `searchFts` with BM25
- `packages/storage/src/search-fts.ts` — row builders, German-safe FTS match query, role filter encoding
- `packages/storage/src/search.ts` — `searchWithFallback`, `searchIndexedKnowledge`, `hasSqliteSearchIndex`
- `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` — rebuilds FTS after scan upserts
- `packages/cli/src/commands/search.ts` — optional `autoguide search` CLI
- Tests: `packages/storage/src/search-index.test.ts`
